summary: Critical issue: action refs not pinned to SHA (security violation). `actions/checkout@v4` and `oven-sh/setup-bun@v2` should use full-length commit SHA per best-practices. TypeScript code is excellent (explicit types, error handling, validation). Workflow missing `bun test` step despite task requiring 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT'; unclear whether integration-only or unit tests must execute. No `set -euo pipefail` in bash. Not production-ready without SHA pinning fix.
